description: Deletes a Job Title given a company ID and job title ID.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: job_title_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Job Title.

schema.description: Schema for a Job Title ID response.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Job Title.
